summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Bariatric Istanbul landing page. All major features working correctly including international phone input, FontAwesome icons, desktop sliders, video testimonials, and WhatsApp integration. Minor mobile interaction issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Close button has visibility/interaction issues - timeout when trying to close modal
Menu button has viewport positioning issues on mobile - element outside viewport

passed_tests: Page loads successfully on desktop and mobile
FontAwesome icons render correctly (WhatsApp, check, star icons)
International phone input shows country flag dropdown and formats numbers
Procedure cards have 'Get Quote' WhatsApp buttons with correct links
Before/After gallery has draggable sliders on desktop
Desktop testimonials display with star ratings
Video testimonials open modal with playable demo video
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
Form inputs visible and functional on mobile
success_percentage: frontend: 85% - Major functionality working, minor mobile interaction issues
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix video modal close button visibility/interaction issue and mobile hamburger menu positioning. Consider improving mobile slider touch interactions for better user experience.
